items.title: Deepfake Detection Dataset Aims to Keep Up With Generative AI
items.summary:
This article is part of our exclusive IEEE Journal Watch series in partnership with IEEE Xplore.
With the rise of AI-generated content online, it’s becoming more difficult—and more important—to help the public identify whether an image, audio clip or video is real or fake. To combat the problem, a team of researchers from Microsoft, Northwestern University in Evanston, Ill., and Witness, a non-profit organization that assists activists and journalists in addressing the challenges associated wit

items.title: Sightings
items.summary:
/elsewhere/sightings/
I have a new camera (a Canon R6 Mark II) so I'm taking a lot more photos of birds. I share my best wildlife photos on iNaturalist, and based on yesterday's successful prototype  I decided to add those to my blog.

I built this feature on my phone using Claude Code for web, as an extension of my beats system for syndicating external content. Here's the PR and prompt.
